creator: wxs@atarininja.org
text:
This PR can be closed for now.  It does not contain a patch for me to
approve and my time is limited right now so I can not come up with one
quickly (the 1.15 update requires a custom post-patch target to apply a
vendor-provided patch that is not relative to $WRKDIR).  Since the 1.16
update is due out in roughly 2 weeks I'll wait on updating this port
until then.  Thanks to Jimmie for the heads up though.  :)

-- WXS
